untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formation pattern detection requires visual/structural analysis of progressive expansion in highs and lows over multiple bars. This multi-bar volatility expansion logic cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators. Donchian channels provide a volatility proxy but do not capture the progressive widening characteristic of the pattern.
translation_notes: Used Donchian breakouts as a proxy for broadening pattern breakouts. Entry conditions detect breakouts beyond recent range extremes. Exit conditions use 20-day moving average crossover as reversal signal. Pattern requires manual visual confirmation of expanding range structure before entry. Success rates and specific failure metrics from source are unavailable (AUTHOR_SILENT).
